mission: IonQ Forte 1 (AWS Braket) Penrose-Hameroff Orch-OR cross-substrate test spec — preregister-only
tier_1_target_desc: Cross-substrate OR signature consistency: trapped-ion vs superconducting QC dephasing comparison
hexa_skeleton_note: Per HEXA-only constraint and cloud-only QPU access, no local hexa script required at preregister stage. Actual Braket SDK calls would occur in user-side Python or AWS Braket Notebook on user authorization.

account_setup_steps: AWS account (personal or institutional) with credit card
Enable Braket in console (auto-creates S3 bucket amazon-braket-<region>-<acct>)
Set CloudWatch billing alarm at $50 USD threshold
Install amazon-braket-sdk locally OR use Braket-provided notebook
First verification: 5-shot Bell test on simulator, then Forte 1 ARN check

ionq_forte_1_naming.honest_c3_arn: Exact ARN string requires user-side Braket console verification; predicted format only

f1_axis.score_formula: PASS=1.0/INCONCLUSIVE=0.5/FAIL=0.0 from F-N12-1, multiplied by F-N12-5 robustness factor (1.0/0.5/0.7)
f1_axis.weight_justification: indirect evidence (substrate-test, not microtubule-direct); low initial weight, recalibrate after F-N12-5 PASS

verified_facts: AWS Braket per-task $0.30 + per-shot $0.08 (Forte) per N-substrate purchase guide 2026-05-01
guessed_or_predicted: Exact ARN string format (Forte-1 vs Forte-Enterprise-1 naming variation)
T1>=10s, T2>=1s, 2q-fidelity>=99.5% (trapped-ion typical, Forte 1 specific datasheet not directly read)
Pulse-level delay control via Braket OpenQASM 3 on Forte 1 (capability exists generally, device-specific availability pending)
PRNewswire SC OR observation tau_2 numerical values (not directly extracted, F-N12-1 user-verify)
Diosi-Penrose mass-scaling simplified form for SC effective mass
GHZ N-qubit decoherence scaling tau_2_GHZ ~ tau_2_single/N (depolarizing approximation)
AWS Braket task-batch parallel submit completes within 1 calendar day for Forte 1
Korea ap-northeast-2 to us-east-1 cross-region task submit no policy blocker

blockers: User authorization required for AWS account onboarding (no auto-onboard)
User authorization required for $20.90 MVP cost
PRNewswire-cited SC OR paper original tau_2 numerical values need user verification
Forte 1 exact device ARN requires Braket console check
Pulse-level delay control on Forte 1 requires device documentation verification
Wall-clock ETA depends on IonQ trapped-ion windowed schedule (typically hours to 1 day)
